name: lc_CalculateLaunchReadinessFx
description: Power Fx Function implementation of the readiness calculator. Same contract as lc_CalculateLaunchReadiness; additionally posts a readiness card to the launch's Microsoft Teams channel when lc_launch.lc_TeamsChannelId is set, and returns the post timestamp as lc_NotifiedAt.

requestParameters.name: LaunchName
requestParameters.description: Name of the lc_launch record to score and (optionally) notify.

responseProperties.name: ReadinessScore
responseProperties.description: 0-100 numeric score across all milestones (delegated to the .NET Custom API).

responseProperties.name: NotifiedAt
responseProperties.description: Timestamp the Teams channel post was made. Blank when the launch has no lc_TeamsChannelId.

connectionReferences.usage: MicrosoftTeams.PostMessageToChannelV3 — post the readiness card to the launch's channel.
